**Workflow name (if applicable):**

**Platform:** <!-- n8n / dify / Not applicable -->

**Package path:** <!-- packages/<workflow-id> or Not applicable -->

**Purpose:**

**External services:** <!-- List them or write None -->

**High-risk capabilities:** <!-- Network, credentials, code, files, email, publishing, or None -->

**Human Review:** <!-- Required checkpoints or Not required, with reason -->

**How tested:**

**Reviewer should especially check:**

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] The Package folder name matches the `workflow.yaml` ID. (Or not applicable.)
- [ ] The Workflow uses n8n or dify. (Or this is not a Workflow submission.)
- [ ] I have the right to submit and license this content, and the license is an SPDX expression.
- [ ] No real Secret, Token, API key, private key, or Credential is included.
- [ ] Permission and safety declarations match the Workflow's actual capabilities.
- [ ] I added a README and safe example input and output. (Or not applicable.)
- [ ] I ran the Validator.
- [ ] I ran the Registry Builder and `verify-registry`.
- [ ] I synced `website/generated/registry.json` from the root Registry.
- [ ] I understand that Validator success does not prove absolute safety.
- [ ] I understand that every Workflow still requires human review.
